err_day: Invalid day. Enter a number between 1–31.
err_month: Invalid month. Enter a number between 1–12.
cmd_bday_set_channel: Channel to use (leave empty for current channel)
lang_reset: Language set to automatic (follows Discord settings).
err_poll_no_channel: Poll channel not set. Use `/poll-set` first.
cmd_poll_day: Send game polls until 16:00 in N days
cmd_poll_day_days: Number of days until the poll closes at 16:00
cmd_poll_end: End all active polls in the poll channel
cmd_poll_set_channel: Channel to use (leave empty for current channel)
cmd_poll_role: Set the role to mention when polls are sent
cmd_poll_noti: Set role to add to poll thread
cmd_poll_noti_param: Role whose members will be added to the thread
voice_modal_rename_placeholder: Leave blank to reset to default
voice_err_owner_only: Only the channel owner can do that.
voice_err_rename_ratelimit: Discord allows only 2 renames per 10 minutes. Try again later.
voice_err_no_voice: Join a voice channel or specify one.
voice_ok_allowed_removed: {mention} has been removed from the allow list.
voice_prompt_memory: Select which settings to remember for your next channel:
voice_prompt_lang: Change the bot language for yourself (affects responses and the control panel):
cmd_voice_set: Set the trigger voice channel for auto-rooms
cmd_voice_set_channel: Voice channel that creates a new room on join (leave empty for the one you're in)
cmd_voice_role: Set the role required to join auto-rooms
cmd_voice_role_param: Role that gets connect permission on every auto-room
cmd_noti_video: Set the Discord channel for all video notifications
cmd_noti_video_channel: Discord channel for new video notifications (leave empty for current channel)
cmd_noti_stream: Set the Discord channel for all stream notifications
cmd_noti_stream_channel: Discord channel for live stream notifications (leave empty for current channel)
cmd_noti_youtube_role: Set the role to mention for YouTube notifications
cmd_noti_youtube_role_param: Role to mention for YouTube videos and streams
cmd_noti_twitch_role: Set the role to mention for Twitch notifications
cmd_noti_twitch_role_param: Role to mention for Twitch streams
cmd_noti_youtube_add: Add a YouTube channel to monitor
cmd_noti_youtube_add_channel: YouTube channel URL, @handle, or channel ID (UCxxxxxx)
cmd_noti_twitch_add: Add a Twitch streamer to monitor
cmd_noti_list: List all monitored YouTube channels and Twitch streamers
noti_err_yt_not_found: YouTube channel not found. Use the channel URL or `@handle`.
cmd_noti_rss_channel: Set the channel for RSS news notifications
cmd_noti_rss_channel_param: Channel to post RSS notifications in (leave empty for current channel)
cmd_noti_rss_role: Set the role to mention for RSS notifications
cmd_noti_rss_role_param: Role to mention for RSS news
cmd_noti_rss_add: Add an RSS feed to monitor
cmd_noti_rss_add_name: Display name (leave empty to use feed title)
noti_err_rss_color: Invalid color. Use a hex value, e.g. 1B2838 or #1B2838.
noti_err_rss_invalid: Could not fetch or parse the RSS feed.
cmd_restart: Pull latest version from GitHub and restart the bot
info_features:
🎮 Weekend game polls
🎂 Birthday notifications
🔊 Auto voice rooms
📺 YouTube & Twitch notifications
🎲 Mini games
cmd_rps: Challenge someone to Rock Paper Scissors
rps_pick_prompt: {challenger} vs {opponent} — both click Pick to make your choice.
rps_not_your_game: This challenge is not for you.
rps_cooldown: You're on cooldown. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
leaderboard_empty: No points scored this season yet.
cmd_game_set: Set the channel for the daily number guessing game
cmd_game_set_channel: Channel to use (leave empty for current channel)
cmd_guess_show: Resend today's guess game message to the guess channel
guess_err_no_channel: Guess channel is not set. Use /guess-set first.
guess_no_active: No active guess game for today.
guess_start: A new game is available! Use **/guess** to play.
guess_hint_div3_no: The number is not divisible by 3.
guess_mod_wordle: 🌀 **Today's modifier: Wordle** — a **bold** digit is in the right place, an __underlined__ one is in the number elsewhere, a plain one isn't in it. The number always has 4 digits.
guess_mod_hotcold: 🌀 **Today's modifier: Hot & Cold** — the bot only tells you the distance, not the direction!
guess_mod_reverse: 🌀 **Today's modifier: Opposite day** — high and low are swapped!
guess_mod_pokerface: 🌀 **Today's modifier: Poker face (April Fools!)** — the bot won't reveal anything, but the number is only 1–99 and points are doubled!
guess_already_solved: ✅ Already solved! You guessed it in **{attempts}** attempt(s) today.
season_auto_reset_empty: New season has started! Scores have been reset.
menu_desc: Pick an action using the buttons below.
menu_bday_remove_confirm: Do you really want to delete your saved birthday?
